nasb.text: The sons of Merari: Mahli and Mushi. These are the families of the Levites according to their generations.

esv.text: The sons of Merari: Mahli and Mushi. These are the clans of the Levites according to their generations.

cnv.text: 米拉利的兒子是抹利和母示。按著他們的世代，這些是利未的家族。

ccb.text: 米拉利的儿子是抹利和姆示。这些是利未的各宗族。
